title: alyssum arabicum
intro: Alyssum arabicum, also known as Tragacanth, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, the plant's dried sap has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a demulcent and emulsifier, to treat digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Alyssum arabicum include soothing irritated mucous membranes, reducing inflammation, and supporting healthy digestion. Herbal preparations of Alyssum arabicum are often used to make poultices, ointments, and capsules, which can be applied topically or taken internally to leverage its medicinal properties.
